nativeDependencies.note: Use the Codex-native KARIMO plugin installed on the machine. Never copy the Claude KARIMO commands into project adapters.
Optional external capability. It only has parity when the user opts in and a Codex-native plugin is installed.

descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/bos-code-quality/SKILL.md: Use when reviewing or editing project code to enforce the same BOS quality rules used by Claude Code.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/incremental-commits/SKILL: Use when planning or making incremental Git commits with focused scope and verification between commits.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/subagent-driven-developme: Use when an approved workflow explicitly calls for delegated implementation or review tasks with independent agents.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/systematic-debugging/SKIL: Use when diagnosing a bug, failing test, regression, or unexpected behavior through evidence-first debugging.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/verification-before-compl: Use before claiming work is complete, fixed, passing, or ready; requires fresh verification evidence.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md: Use when a task needs an implementation plan with concrete files, steps, tests, and completion checks.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/security-guidance/hooks/h: Use when editing security-sensitive code; applies the same security reminders and blocking rules used by Claude Code.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/learning-output-style/REA: Use when the user requests learning output style with interactive contributions and educational implementation insights.
descriptionOverrides..claude/skills/explanatory-output-style/: Use when the user requests explanatory output style with concise educational implementation insights.

specialInstructions..claude/plugins/ralph-wiggum/commands/ra: Do not execute the Bash-only Claude setup script. From the repository root, run `python3 .codex/hooks/ralph_adapter.py start ...` on Unix, or `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .codex/hooks/run-python.ps1 .codex/hooks/ralph_adapter.py start ...` on Windows, followed by the user's prompt and options. Then work on that prompt. The adapter writes the same `.claude/ralph-loop.local.md` state used by Claude.
specialInstructions..claude/plugins/ralph-wiggum/commands/ca: From the repository root, run the portable Ralph adapter's `cancel` action (`python3 .codex/hooks/ralph_adapter.py cancel` on Unix or `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .codex/hooks/run-python.ps1 .codex/hooks/ralph_adapter.py cancel` on Windows); do not delete state with a platform-specific shell command.
specialInstructions..claude/skills/learning-output-style/REA: For the current task, read and apply the canonical SessionStart context in `.claude/skills/learning-output-style/hooks-handlers/session-start.sh`. New Codex sessions default to this mode; `CODEX_OUTPUT_STYLE=learning` selects it explicitly.
specialInstructions..claude/skills/explanatory-output-style/: For the current task, read and apply the canonical SessionStart context in `.claude/skills/explanatory-output-style/hooks-handlers/session-start.sh`. Set `CODEX_OUTPUT_STYLE=explanatory` before starting Codex to select it for a new session.
